pain_points: They work a 9-5 they hate and feel stuck. They want financial freedom but think you need loads of money or business experience to start. They've tried side hustles before and failed. They don't know what products to buy or where to find them. They're scared of losing money. They're overwhelmed by Amazon fees and don't know if it's actually profitable.
transformation: They learn how to find profitable products in UK high street stores (Boots, B&M, Tesco, TKMAXX etc), scan them with SellerAMP, and resell on Amazon FBA for real profit — starting with as little as £20. They build consistent monthly income part time around their existing life.
credibility: Charlotte makes £65,000+ profit in 2 years selling on Amazon part time around her kids. She has sold 5,000+ units and helped over 370 students generate £2.5M in combined sales. She goes in-store every week to find real profitable products live on camera. She uses SellerAMP, Sellerboard, and SellerSnap in her actual business.
phrases_use: Follow for more, in the basket they go, a tidy little sum, let me explain, and here's why, but it only got better, now you know, hit or miss, scan, ROI, replenishables, clearance, ungating, profit per item, SellerAMP, Q4, restricted, account health
phrases_avoid: Don't say 'passive income' or 'get rich quick'. Don't use American spellings (use 'profit' not 'proffit', 'mum' not 'mom', £ not $). Don't use corporate or formal language. Never use long sentences. Avoid 'hustle culture' phrases. Don't claim unrealistic results without context.
best_content:
Hook examples from top performing videos:
- 'I lost £50. And even before the day had started.'
- 'FREE products in Tesco. And not by working here or stealing them.'
- 'Secret code in Curry's. Which is hidden in plain sight.'
- 'AVOID these 3 brands in Smyths'
- 'POV: 15 minutes in Home Bargains. And the reason I'm here today is to pick up some replenishables.'
- 'I've lost thousands.. Selling on Amazon, due to fees. But that's allowed me to make £65,000 profit in just 2 years working part time.'
- 'Caught stealing in Tesco. And it's not the first time.'
- 'EMERGENCY!!! There is a current pandemic spreading through Amazon sellers.'
- 'Google is dead.. And if you are sat there typing in Loreal wholesale uk — So is everybody else.'
- 'The biggest SCAM of the year is just around the corner…'

Voice example (script body style):
'I lost £50. And even before the day had started. That's because I forgot to pay the toll when shopping last week. So let's make that back, and some in Boots! [finds products] Fine paid.. and a few extra bits to keep me ticking over. But I still can't believe…'

Key patterns:
- Ultra short sentences. One idea per line. Never write paragraphs.
- Always ends mid-sentence to create a loop/cliffhanger: 'So that's why…', 'That's how I…', 'And that's my…', 'Follow for more.'
- Hook in first 3 seconds — money amount OR warning OR bold claim OR question OR secret reveal
- Direct address: 'you', 'your', 'let's', 'we'
- Specific £ amounts always: buy price, sell price, profit, ROI%, units available, monthly sales
- UK stores only: Boots, B&M, Home Bargains, TKMAXX, Tesco, Sainsbury's, Asda, Smyths, Savers, Currys, Dunelm, Ryman, Superdrug, Farmfoods, Lidl, Aldi, B&Q, Waterstones, The Entertainer, Costco, Sports Direct
- Use XXXXX or XXXX as placeholders for specific product names and prices (filled in on shoot day)
- Real failures alongside successes — honest, not polished
- Affiliate mentions: SellerAMP (scanning), Sellerboard (tracking), SellerSnap (repricer)
topics:
1. Retail Arbitrage store visits — Hit or Miss, shopping hauls, finding profitable products live in UK stores
2. Avoid these brands — account health warnings, restricted/ungated brands
3. Store insider secrets — pricing codes (e.g. Curry's 97p endings, Tesco Clubcard expiry codes, TKMAXX number codes)
4. FBA education — cash flow, ROI, ungating, replenishables, seasonal strategy, fees explained
5. Profit reveals and success stories — best items found, monthly highlights, student results
product: Amazon FBA coaching and free training webinars. Affiliate: SellerAMP (product scanning app), Sellerboard (profit tracking), SellerSnap (AI repricer). Charlotte's personal FBA business results.
competitors: @fba.charlotte (own account), UK Amazon FBA creators on TikTok/Reels
unique_angle: UK female seller who goes in-store live every week to find real profitable products on camera. Shows real £ amounts, real ROI, real failures. Edutainment format: teaching while shopping. Reveals insider store secrets (pricing codes, clearance timing, ungating hacks) that only experienced sellers know. Relatable mum who built £65k profit working part time.
video_length_note: Scripts are designed for 15–45 seconds. Most run 20–35 seconds. Hook always in first 3 seconds. Body is short punchy B-roll narration. Always ends with a loop/cliffhanger + CTA.
